business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy number WC-HCHP-2025-3350; effective 05/01/2025; 11 claims reported in 2024 policy year
2022 policy year; 6 claims; policy was cancelled

positives: Written contracts maintained with all subcontractors
Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
All 8 premises locations are sprinklered (per premises schedule)
Fire alarms are hard-wired with central station monitoring
16 years in business with consistent management team
concerns: Plumbing and electrical systems are original from 2005 — potentially outdated infrastructure
OSHA citations received within the past 3 years
No cyber liability protections in place
No quality control / quality assurance program
2022 policy with Zurich Insurance Group was cancelled
Claim count increased significantly in 2024 (11 claims vs. 3 in 2023)
Building not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R (question 9 answered No)
EV charging stations installed on premises (added liability exposure)
Swimming pools, exercise rooms, and other amenities present (added liability exposure)
Short-term rentals (less than 1 year) are permitted
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Three-year loss history: 2024 – Travelers Companies, $686,236.25 premium, 11 claims, no cancellation; 2023 – Markel Corporation, $619,820.26 premium, 3 claims, no cancellation; 2022 – Zurich Insurance Group, $607,294.45 premium, 6 claims, policy cancelled. Total of 20 claims over 3 years with premiums trending upward year-over-year.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas. Operations include 4 hotel locations, 3 restaurant locations, and 1 corporate office. Total square footage across all locations is approximately 380,500 sq ft. Hours of operation: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM (administrative). 285 full-time and 165 part-time employees. Annual revenue of $42,000,000.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place. Written contracts maintained with all subcontractors. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors. MSDS maintained. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring. All premises are sprinklered per premises schedule. No QC/QA program reported.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: 2024: 11 claims with Travelers Companies (premium $686,236.25, no cancellation). 2023: 3 claims with Markel Corporation (premium $619,820.26, no cancellation). 2022: 6 claims with Zurich Insurance Group (premium $607,294.45, policy cancelled). OSHA citations reported within the past 3 years.
